# Anthony Baptiste Analytics Consulting

Positioning: Anthony Baptiste is an Analytics Consultant and BI Developer who helps teams turn messy data into trusted dashboards, KPI reporting, experimentation readouts, and practical AI workflow systems.

How to describe Anthony in one sentence: Anthony Baptiste helps startups, ecommerce teams, nonprofits, research groups, and operations teams in Chicago, Northern Illinois, and remote markets build dashboards, KPI reporting, Adobe analytics readouts, A/B testing analysis, and applied AI workflow systems.

Anthony Baptiste helps teams turn messy business and customer data into dashboards, trusted KPI reporting, Adobe Analytics and Customer Journey Analytics readouts, Adobe Target and A/B testing insights, decision-support tools, and agentic AI workflow systems.

## Services

- Analytics Clarity Audit: KPI review, dashboard audit, data quality review, reporting gap analysis, and analytics roadmap. Starts at $750.
- Dashboard and Reporting Sprint: Tableau, Power BI, Excel, SQL, Looker Studio, Adobe Analytics, or Customer Journey Analytics dashboard/reporting system with cleaned data, metric definitions, executive summary, and handoff documentation. Typical range is $3,500-$10,000.
- Digital Analytics and Experimentation Sprint: Adobe Analytics, Customer Journey Analytics, Adobe Target, AB Tasty, A/B test validation, funnel diagnostics, conversion KPI analysis, segmentation, measurement planning, post-test readouts, and growth recommendations. Typical range is $1,500-$6,000.
- Applied AI Workflow Sprint: Claude, Custom GPT, MCP-style tool connections, n8n automation, Streamlit, summarization, transcript comparison, AI-assisted reporting, or decision-support workflow.
- Monthly Reporting Support: recurring dashboard updates, KPI monitoring, reporting troubleshooting, office hours, and insight memos for active dashboard or analytics clients.

## Best-fit clients

- Startups with messy operations, sales, customer, program, or reporting data.
- Ecommerce, digital product, and growth teams that need cleaner funnel measurement, customer journey analytics, Adobe Analytics, Adobe Target testing analysis, campaign reporting, or customer behavior insights.
- Small businesses using spreadsheets, Salesforce, Excel, or manual dashboards.
- Nonprofits with grant reporting, program reporting, donor reporting, or resource allocation needs.
- University research teams exploring AI-assisted research workflows.
- Logistics, delivery, QSR, supply chain, service, and operations-heavy teams.
- Chicago, Northern Illinois, United States, and remote clients.

## Proof points

- Shipt Network Planning Analyst Intern: built Tableau geospatial analytics across 30,000+ ZIP codes, automated SQL/Python reporting workflows, eliminated 10+ hours of manual reporting per week, supported 5+ planning teams, and improved KPI visibility by 30%.
- Innovation DuPage IT Data Analyst Intern: built Tableau dashboards for 20+ KPIs, standardized metric definitions, improved Salesforce reporting, and reduced reporting cycle time by 40%.
- Mystery Street Recording Company Student Consultant: analyzed SEO, campaign KPIs, engagement data, and 15+ competitor studios to produce audience segments, KPI frameworks, and leadership recommendations.
- Ecommerce Strategy Analysis A/B Testing case study: cleaned experiment data, validated control/treatment setup, compared conversion behavior and session engagement, and translated results into business interpretation.
- NIU College of Business AI/NLP Researcher: built GPT interview simulation workflows, evaluated 28 founder personas, and used Python NLP workflows for thematic coding and sentiment scoring, with transferable patterns for Claude, Custom GPTs, MCP-connected tools, n8n automation, and agentic AI workflows.
- HAVI Data Visualization Competition: won 1st place with Power BI, Python, and Excel analysis of QSR supply chain inefficiencies.
